name: poors-man-claudeagent
description: Emulates a cloud agent flow: build a code-transformation prompt, watch a download directory for the resulting bash script, execute it, and rollback.

commands.title: Poor Man's Claude: Pick Upload Directory
Poor Man's Claude: Pick Download Directory
Poor Man's Claude: Add Codebase Directory

poorMansClaude.codebaseDirs.description: One or more directories to scan recursively as the codebase context.

poorMansClaude.uploadDir.description: Directory where the generated prompt file will be placed for upload to Claude.

poorMansClaude.downloadDir.description: Directory the extension polls for the bash script returned by Claude.

poorMansClaude.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum size per scanned file (bytes). Files larger than this are skipped.

poorMansClaude.maxTotalBytes.description: Soft cap on total assembled prompt size (bytes). A warning is shown if exceeded.
